findings.title: Governance chain complexity hotspot
findings.description: The number of P6 governance artifacts and tests is high, increasing maintenance and review overhead.
findings.recommendedAction: Consolidate cross-cutting governance assertions and create a canonical index/update workflow.
findings.resolutionNotes: Shared governance helper layer and targeted P7/P6 refactoring reduce duplication; further consolidation remains in backlog.

findings.title: Repeated status text drift risk
findings.description: Multiple docs repeat long status/limitations wording, increasing the probability of stale or conflicting statements.
findings.recommendedAction: Deduplicate status language and link to canonical sections.
findings.resolutionNotes: Addressed via canonical security-release-boundary and normalized security-governance-index references.

findings.title: Status naming inconsistency
findings.description: Status labels across governance artifacts use multiple similar terms and can be normalized.
findings.recommendedAction: Define a normalized status vocabulary and enforce it in consistency tests.
findings.resolutionNotes: Addressed via security-governance-status-vocabulary and normalized status usage in index/inventory.

findings.title: Release-ready observability/performance overhead
findings.description: Release-ready script duration and output volume are high for iterative governance work.
findings.recommendedAction: Add profile modes and structured summary output for faster governance feedback.
findings.resolutionNotes: Release-ready observability audit completed; stage timing, deterministic summary, and safe failure diagnostics added without changing gate semantics.

recommendedBacklog.title: Docs deduplication and canonical index
recommendedBacklog.description: Reduce repeated status/limitations sections and centralize stage references.
recommendedBacklog.completionNotes: Canonical release boundary, status vocabulary, and index normalization delivered.

recommendedBacklog.title: Governance test consolidation
recommendedBacklog.description: Extract shared no-write/no-claims assertions to reduce test duplication.
recommendedBacklog.completionNotes: Shared governance helper classes added and key P7 tests refactored; selected P6 duplication reduced.

recommendedBacklog.title: Ownership backfill CLI UX cleanup
recommendedBacklog.description: Improve command help and error grouping while keeping apply disabled.
recommendedBacklog.completionNotes: CLI command inventory/help output/exit-code model/redaction tests added; apply remains disabled.

recommendedBacklog.title: Release-ready script observability/performance audit
recommendedBacklog.description: Tune feedback loops and runtime for repeated governance verification.
recommendedBacklog.completionNotes: Release-ready observability audit and safe diagnostics improvements implemented; gate semantics unchanged.

recommendedBacklog.title: CI/GitHub checks visibility
recommendedBacklog.description: Improve external visibility of governance gates and release-boundary status.
recommendedBacklog.completionNotes: CI/GitHub checks visibility audit/runbook and workflow safety tests added; no runtime/write-path changes.

recommendedBacklog.title: Route inventory and claims consistency automation
recommendedBacklog.description: Add deeper cross-doc and cross-test consistency checks.
recommendedBacklog.completionNotes: Route inventory coverage automation, classification model, and claims/rate-limit/audit/tenant-scope/protection-stage consistency tests added.

recommendedBacklog.title: Security docs map and decision record
recommendedBacklog.description: Build a durable map of P5/P6/P7 governance decisions and ownership.
recommendedBacklog.completionNotes: Security docs map and ADR artifacts added (security-docs-map + ADR-0001 + adr-index) with no runtime/write-path behavior changes.

recommendedBacklog.title: Post-P6 architecture decision record consolidation
recommendedBacklog.description: Consolidate architecture invariants and future enablement boundaries.
recommendedBacklog.completionNotes: Security architecture decision matrix and future security ADR backlog added; ADR-0001 and release-boundary references updated.

nonClaims: No full multi-tenant isolation claim yet.
No global EF query filter claim.
